content: Cosmograph cosmos (@cosmograph/cosmos) is a WebGL GPU graph engine: GPU force-directed layout computed live, pan/zoom/hover, point/link color & size by value (degree sizing/coloring), select/focus nodes, fit-view, neighborhood selection, dynamic simulation params. Higher-level Cosmograph adds powerful filtering+search with histograms and a Timeline time-dimension for dataset evolution. It does NOT do edge bundling (straight-line edges). Built-in analytics are limited (degree-ish via point size by value); community detection must be supplied externally (e.g. graphology Louvain).
